note.zh: Kimi K2.7-Code(Qoder · Default)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「荆棘王冠」。诊断:API 合规却几乎不圈地——两个种子圈地均为 0 格、得分冻在出生点的 9(9:1131、9:1171)。策略能跑但从未向外扩张,实战等同不动。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Kimi K2.7-Code (Qoder, Default) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "荆棘王冠" (Crown of Thorns). Diagnosis: API-compliant but barely captures anything — 0 captures on both seeds, score frozen at the 9-cell spawn (9:1131, 9:1171). The policy runs but never expands outward, effectively motionless in play.
